Step 01 · Dinner

Where do you want to eat?

✓
View-First 👁️
Dinner · American · $$$$
The Eagle's Nest
📍 1 S Capitol Ave · Hyatt Regency, 23rd Fl
Only Revolving Restaurant in Indiana 360° Views ~$50/plate Business Casual
  • Full 360° city rotation over ~90 minutes
  • Glass elevator ride up through the hotel atrium
  • Server Anthony is a consistent standout
Our Take

Uniquely Indy — the only revolving restaurant in the state. The view does 100% of the heavy lifting. Food is solidly okay for the price. Go for the experience, not the steak.

✓
⭐ Our Pick
Dinner · Steakhouse · $$$$
Prime 47
📍 47 S Pennsylvania St · Downtown
Locally Owned USDA Prime + Wagyu A5 1895 Historic Building Marble Columns
  • Original tile floors, 18-ft windows, live pianist
  • Wagyu A5, dry-aged cuts, seafood tower
  • Servers in white lab coats — full menu breakdown
Our Take

Top pick. Locally owned in a stunning 1895 historic building with marble columns and 18-ft windows. The Wagyu and dry-aged cuts are excellent. French onion soup and baby iceberg are must-orders.

✓
✨ Fan Favorite
Dinner · Supper Club · $$$
The Fountain Room
📍 830 Massachusetts Ave · Bottleworks
Art Deco Supper Club Velvet Banquettes Lobster Bisque Tableside 4.7★ Google
  • Prime rib served tableside with warm au jus
  • Chandeliers, clamshell booths, Roaring '20s energy
  • Wagyu meatloaf, brie brûlée, housemade desserts
Our Take

More personality than a traditional steakhouse. Art Deco supper club energy on Mass Ave, incredible food, 4.7 stars from nearly 4,000 reviews. Ribeye and prime rib are both excellent.

and after dinner...
Step 02 · After Dinner

Which rooftop calls you?

✓
🔥 Hottest in Indy
Rooftop Bar · Cocktails · $$$
Astrea
📍 17 W Market St · InterContinental, 11th Fl
Monument Circle Views Opened 2025 DJs on Weekends Floor-to-Ceiling Windows
  • Indy's highest rooftop — $120M InterContinental renovation
  • Indoor + outdoor · direct Monument Circle views
  • Creative cocktails, small plates, bottle service
Our Take

Downtown's hottest new rooftop. 11th floor of the newly renovated InterContinental, floor-to-ceiling views of Monument Circle. DJs on weekends, creative cocktails. This is the rooftop move right now.

✓
🥂 Cozy + Chic
Rooftop Bar · Wine + Cocktails · $$
ELEVATE
📍 141 E Washington St · Hotel Indy, 6th Fl
Indoor + Outdoor All-Season Intimate Energy Downtown Views
  • Six floors up in the heart of downtown Indy
  • Top-line wine, beer, and cocktail menu
  • Romantic and easygoing — not a nightlife scene
Our Take

The understated choice. Intimate, romantic, easy to settle into. More date night than scene. Perfect if you want to actually hear each other and end the night right.

✓
✓ You've Been Here
Rooftop Bar · Neighborhood Vibe · $
Rooftop Garden
📍 1105 Prospect St · Fountain Square Theatre
DJ Every Night Panoramic City Views Summer Season Only Neighborhood Energy
  • Top of the Fountain Square Theatre Building
  • DJ every night, cocktails, wine, draft beer
  • Open daily 6PM–11PM (1AM Fri–Sat)
Our Take

You know this one. Great views, DJ every night, chill Fountain Square energy. More social scene than date night lounge — but genuinely fun if you're in the mood to dance a little.

✓
🏙️ Lively Vibes
Rooftop Bar · Casual · $$
Pivot Bar + Balcony
📍 130 S Pennsylvania St · Hyatt Place
3,000 sq ft Balcony Fire Pits Gainbridge Views Big Screens
  • Massive 3,000 sq ft outdoor space, fire pits
  • Steps from Gainbridge Fieldhouse
  • Pivot Paloma + The Southern Gentleman — must-tries
Our Take

More casual and energetic than the others. Less intimate date energy, more big night out. Perfect when there's a game in town. Not the most romantic — but a guaranteed good time.
